summary: Tested new Case Map feature at /map route. All 19 frontend tests and 12 backend tests passed. The India map displays correctly with state markers colored by case density. Delhi has the largest marker (35 cases), Uttar Pradesh (2), Maharashtra (1). Side panel opens on marker click showing Filed Cases and Precedent Cases sections. All existing pages continue to work.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (pre-existing from iteration_7)

critical_code_review_comments: Case Map feature implemented correctly with all required functionality
GET /api/cases/by-state endpoint returns proper state data with filed and precedent cases
Route order is correct - /api/cases/by-state placed before /api/cases/{case_id}
State markers use data-testid attributes for testing (map-marker-delhi, map-marker-uttar-pradesh, etc.)
Side panel has proper data-testid attributes (state-panel, state-panel-close, panel-backdrop)
View Analysis links correctly navigate to /analysis/{case_id}
Header has gradient styling consistent with other pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Map feature at /map is fully functional. Delhi has 35 cases (3 filed + 32 precedent), Uttar Pradesh has 2 cases, Maharashtra has 1 case. The map shows 27 empty state markers (grey dots) for states without cases. Side panel shows Filed Cases with View Analysis links and Precedent Cases with court/year/outcome info. All navigation and existing pages work correctly.
features_verified: Case Map page loads at /map route
Header shows 'Cases Across India' title with Geographic Analysis label
Stats show Total Cases (38) and States (3) count
India SVG map renders with state outline
Legend shows density scale (Few cases, Moderate, High density)
Delhi marker is largest (35 cases) with red/orange color
27 empty state markers (grey dots) for states without cases
Clicking state marker opens side panel
Side panel shows state name and case count
Filed Cases section shows case titles, jurisdictions, judges, status badges
Precedent Cases section shows case names, courts, years, outcomes
Case Map nav link appears in navbar
Existing pages (landing, submit, judges, history) still work
